problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
